name: mortalos
description: A hostless, mortal network OS that lives across connected browsers.

scripts.test: npm run verify:license && npm run verify:p0 && npm run test:conformance && npm run test:properties && npm run verify:h2
scripts.test:conformance: node --test test/codec.test.mjs test/crypto.test.mjs test/validator.test.mjs test/mortality.test.mjs test/process-determinism.test.mjs
